user.title: Weekly Thermostat
user.description: This creates the Weekly Thermostat. After setup, use the integration's "Configure" button to add daily profiles, floors and areas.

abort.already_configured: Weekly Thermostat is already set up.

profiles.title: Daily profiles
profiles.description: Pick a profile to edit, or add a new one.

profile_edit.title: Edit profile
profile_edit.description: One slot per line as "HH:MM temperature" (e.g. "06:30 21"). The first slot must start at 00:00.

floors.title: Floors
floors.description: Pick a floor to edit, or add a new one.

floor_edit.title: Edit floor
floor_edit.description: Assign a daily profile to each weekday. Optionally link a Home Assistant floor. Overrides replace the schedule for a date range: one "YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD profile" per line.

areas.title: Areas
areas.description: Pick the floor whose areas you want to manage.

area_select.title: Areas
area_select.description: Pick an area to edit, or add a new one.

area_pick.title: Add area
area_pick.description: Pick the Home Assistant area to control. Its temperature sensor and switches will be suggested next.

error.invalid_slots: Invalid slots. Use "HH:MM temperature" on each line; the first slot must start at 00:00.
error.invalid_overrides: Invalid overrides. Use "YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD profile" on each line, referencing an existing profile.
error.no_profiles: Create at least one daily profile before adding a floor.
error.no_floors: Create at least one floor before adding areas.
error.area_exists: That area is already configured on this floor.
